name: ascent-to-orbit
description: Take off from the Earth surface, climb past the atmosphere ceiling (384) into orbit, assert nav_mode flips to low/high_orbit.
_notes: Durations assume fly_speed 16 b/s (run x2 = 32 b/s). 25 s of run-vertical thrust climbs ~800 blocks (well above the 384+32 orbit band). Tune seconds live from the streamed alt.
